primary_sources.name: The Kidney Project: An Artificial Kidney to Treat Kidney Failure
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of bioartificial kidney development and The Kidney Project progress

primary_sources.name: Wearable Artificial Kidney: Technical Requirements and Clinical Adaptation
primary_sources.relevance: Detailed analysis of WAK technology, sorbent systems, and clinical implementation challenges

primary_sources.name: Advances in Portable and Wearable Dialysis Devices for End-Stage Renal Disease
primary_sources.organization: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
primary_sources.relevance: Current state of portable dialysis technology and filtration advances

primary_sources.name: Bioartificial Kidney Engineering: Progress and Challenges
primary_sources.relevance: Latest developments in implantable bioartificial organs and tissue engineering approaches

secondary_sources.name: The Kidney Project Official Website
secondary_sources.relevance: Primary source for updates on implantable bioartificial kidney development

gaps: Limited formal clinical guidelines exist as these technologies are still investigational
No established KDIGO or KDOQI recommendations for patient selection criteria
Regulatory pathways and reimbursement frameworks are not yet defined
